symptom_vector: node disk full with high disk utilization and disk space exhaustion

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-05 节点因 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标异常飙升导致磁盘空间耗尽
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标从正常中位数25.18%飙升至故障期间63.61%，变化率86.56%
Step 2: 分析该指标P99值从36.0%上升到91.42%，确认磁盘使用率异常严重且接近饱和
Step 3: 确认故障期间该节点上运行的 cartservice-1、paymentservice-1、currencyservice-0 等服务可能受到磁盘IO影响

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden increase from baseline (e.g., >50% change rate)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查所有节点的 node_filesystem_usage_rate 指标，重点关注变化率超过50%的异常节点
